creator: stepan@zabreh.cz
text:
In Zabbix-Agent is a problem with the "active checks". The agent reported in the log "No active checks on the server: host [backup-on] not found". The Zabbix server in the log message "Sending list of active checks that [] failed: host [backup-on] not found".

In zabbix-agent:
tail -f /tmp/zabbix_agentd.log

36574:20110726:081352.914 Starting Zabbix Agent. Zabbix 1.8.5 (revision 19050).
36575:20110726:081352.915 agent #0 started [collector]
36576:20110726:081352.916 agent #1 started [listener]
36577:20110726:081352.916 agent #2 started [listener]
36578:20110726:081352.917 agent #3 started [listener]
36579:20110726:081352.925 agent #4 started [active checks]
36579:20110726:081353.110 No active checks on server: host [backup-on] not found

In zabbix-server:
tail -f /var/log/zabbix/zabbix_server.log

34072:20110726:081520.819 Sending list of active checks to [] failed: host [backup-on] not found

Hostname is entered in exactly the same in zabbix_agentd.conf and frontend zabbix. This is a valid hostname in DNS (checked via nslookup).

When I turn off "active checks" on the client, those messages disappear from log.
